g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the proxy.js request guard work?')
g.text: JWT cookie validation (access_token / refresh_token) · RBAC for /sa /ca /ag · in-memory rate limit
Injects x-user-id · x-role · x-tenant-id headers downstream
